YAYAYY THE WHOLE GANG IS HERE YAAYAA

ok so basically I’ll explain what everyone is wearing

Pierrot: in a simple black shirt covering most of his upper body, seeming like it was just bought. Simple shorts in a red horizontal crosshatch pattern, ending off with black socks and sandals

Harlequin: Unlike Pierrot, he’s without a shirt. Only wearing Minecraft creeper boxers resting low on his hips, his chest out and about.

Ticket-Taker: In a fancy, dark blue robe, his chest out but his arms, shoulders, and sides covered. With the robe, he wore black shorts going down to his knees, the strings tied up in a small bow, ending the outfit with blue soft slippers

Jester: Unlike most of the others, he was in a fancy, purple, woman-like robe. The middle tied in a beautiful, big bow to hide his stomach, the robe having a coat-like fluff around the collar and edges of the end of the robe. Purple shorts under the robe, ending the outfit with black heels

The Doctor: With his menacing black plague doctor mask featuring glowing cyan/blue goggles and a long, pointed beak, he was wearing a simple nightcap in red, a simple night dress in a dark red and his feet covered in black socks

LMAFOO JESTER IS SO CUNTY I CANNOT

strut that shit QUEEN 🩷

The nickname for the bot/Chat name is all of their names in alphabetical order, going from A to Z

But ticket-taker lowkey a baddie 😏
